s: In 2013, Kyuji Fujikawa suited up for CHC as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.250, WHIP 1.080, SO 14, WAR 0.200.
In 2014, Kyuji Fujikawa suited up for CHC as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.850, WHIP 1.850, SO 17, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHC -> TEX).
In 2015, Kyuji Fujikawa suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 16.200, WHIP 1.200, SO 1, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined TEX.
